name: hud_ui_container_update_all
description: HudUiContainer::UpdateAll skips disabled containers and dispatches Update(deltaSeconds) to each child in order.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?UpdateAll@HudUiContainer@@QAEXM@Z at 0x4bc900 still fails: 21 unmasked mismatches, 0 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 40 bytes, VC object symbol size 48 bytes.
